rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in component type scopes for port assumptions/guarantees, and in implementation scopes for subcomponent bindings.
Use annex agree {** ... **}; blocks for AGREE content, with type scopes for constants and equations, implementation scopes for assignments.
generic_rules: Ensure AGREE expressions use only visible identifiers and preserve type consistency.
Use valid AGREE syntax: assume, guarantee, eq, const, assign with proper types.
Avoid referencing implementation-only subcomponents in component type contracts.
Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers not present in the model.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks.
Constants and equations go in component type scopes; assignments in implementation scopes.
Helper declarations must match expression types: bool for comparisons, int/real for numeric.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level guarantees in component type annexes.
Do not reference non-visible identifiers or undefined types in AGREE contracts.
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names as AGREE variables
AGREE annex placement for assume/guarantee syntax
Model unit or package staging issues
